context: The one who is righteous turns from idolatry (see [[1JN.5:21]]).

Israel must keep her identity pure and distinct. In the same way, the Church, the new Israel, is called to separate herself from the heretics or those willfully estranged from Christ (see [[2CO.6:14]]-17).

This verse describes the important role of the guardian angel, who watches and guides us through the day. For other examples, see [[EXO.23:20]]-23; 32:34; [[PSA.90:11]].
